reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college, but the results of the college were very bad, especially in 2022 and 2023.

review_content.Placements: In my course, the placement did not happen because it was a very cheap course, according to me, which has no value in other colleges. The package was not to be accepted by students because, at this college, no company offers placement. The internship gets all of the students into tier fields as per course.
review_content.Infrastructure: I have seen the infrastructure of other colleges, and compared to my college, it was the worst infrastructure in my college. Yes, I would love to say that the labs and library were fully maintained and all the study materials were available here. The canteen and sports facilities were also good at this college.

Government Medical College Ankushapu NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 25523 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

Government Medical College Ankushapu MBBS cutoff 2025 was 25523 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 25712 for admission to the MBBS course. Comparing both categories, the cutoff rank was more competitive for the General category students as compared to the OBC category for MBBS admission. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

description: Lalitha Super Specialities Hospital NEET SS cutoff 2025 is out for Round 1. The NBEMS has released the NEET SS cutoff for admission to Super Speciality courses, such as DM, DNB and MCh etc. The cutoff is available for different categories under the AI quota. For the General category students under the AI quota, the NEET SS 2025 cutoff ranged between 2528 and 2955, with DNB being the highly sought-after course for admission.

Lalitha Super Specialities Hospital DNB cutoff 2025 ranged between 2528 and 2955 for the General category under the AI quota. With a lowest cutoff rank of 2528, DNB in Neurology turned out to be the most competitive specialisation for admission.
Students not eligible for this specialisation can also consider DNB in Cardiology with a lenient first-round cutoff rank of for admission.

placements.overview: The details of Kaveri University placement 2025 are not yet available. It will be updated once it is released. The college provides several opportunities to students for industry exposure, internships, and placement assistance by a dedicated Kaveri University Hyderabad placement team. Further, the college guarantees 100% placement assistance to students and offers job opportunities in elite luxury brands. The placement cell operates throughout the year to facilitate networking between companies and graduates.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Kaveri University courses are offered to students at UG, PG, Doctoral, and Certificate levels. The college offers these courses in full-time mode. Kaveri University courses are UGC-recognised and are offered to students across various specialisations. Some of the most popular specialisations at UG and PG level includes Agriculture, Horticulture, Forestry, Seed Science & Technology, Organic Farming, Genetics & Plant Breeding, etc.

faqs.answer: A:    Kaveri University admissions to all the courses is entrance-based. The admission form is out for all courses. To be eligible for admission need to fulfill the desired course eligibility criteria. Candidates looking for admission to Kaveri University must fill out the online application form by visiting the official website of the university.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility to apply for admission to various courses at Kaveri University?

faqs.answer: A:    Kaveri University offers entrance-based admission to all courses. For certificate courses, college offers merit-based admission to students. To proceed with filling out the application form, candidates must visit the official website of the university and apply for the desired course. Based on the entrance exam score and Psychometric Test score, followed by the PI round, it is easy to grab a seat at Kaveri University.
faqs.question: Is it hard to get a seat in Kaveri University?
